Welcome to
SWAN SATURN AIRDROP

Share Prize Pool of 3,000,000 SWAN

22nd January, 00:00 (EST) - 22nd March, 00:00 (EST)
Saturn airdrop is the public airdrop of Swan Chain, a layer 2 AI computing blockchain with Superchain technology. Our mission is to rigorously showcase the capabilities of Swan Chain, with the help of the developer community.
